nasb.text: “Go out of the ark, you and your wife and your sons and your sons’ wives with you.

esv.text: “Go out from the ark, you and your wife, and your sons and your sons’ wives with you.

cnv.text: “你要從方舟出來，你和你的妻子、兒子，以及兒媳都要和你一同出來。

ccb.text: “你与妻子、儿子和儿媳可以出方舟了。

csbs.text: “你与你的妻子、儿子们和儿媳们，一起从方舟出来吧！
